summary: Data Quality Layer P0 fully tested. All 39 backend unit/API tests passed. Frontend verified: DQS badge correctly hidden when DQS=1.0, all macro panels (VIX, VXN, Gamma, Term Structure, Treasury) displaying LIVE data. LKGStore, CircuitBreaker, DataEpochManager, and DQS Step Function all working correctly.

minor.issue: Circuit breaker OPEN (3 failures) - jblanked.com API returning errors. Using static fallback correctly.
RVX using FALLBACK (Yahoo Finance may have delisted ^RVX). Static fallback value 24.0 used correctly.

passed_tests: ✅ LKG Store: update() stores LIVE data with correct confidence
✅ LKG Store: get() returns LIVE within TTL
✅ LKG Store: get() returns STALE (deterministic, not random) when past TTL
✅ LKG Store: get() returns static FALLBACK when no real data exists
✅ FALLBACK values are deterministic (no np.random)
✅ All 7 sources have static fallbacks defined
✅ Circuit Breaker: starts in CLOSED state
✅ Circuit Breaker: 3 failures -> OPEN state, skips calls
✅ Circuit Breaker: after recovery_timeout -> HALF_OPEN, allows 1 test call
✅ Circuit Breaker: success in HALF_OPEN -> CLOSED (recovered)
✅ Circuit Breaker: failure in HALF_OPEN -> OPEN
✅ CircuitBreakerRegistry creates breakers on demand
✅ CircuitBreakerRegistry returns same breaker instance
✅ DataEpoch: seal_epoch() creates immutable epoch with all 7 data sources
✅ DataEpoch: epoch_manager.current returns last sealed epoch
✅ DataEpoch: epoch includes confidence_map for all sources
✅ DataEpoch: computes DQS from confidence levels
✅ DQS: all LIVE -> DQS = 1.0
✅ DQS Step Function: DQS >= 0.9 -> lot_pct unchanged (FULL)
✅ DQS: 2+ STALE sources -> DQS in [0.75, 0.9)
✅ DQS Step Function: DQS in [0.75, 0.9) -> lot_pct halved (DEFENSIVE)
✅ DQS: 3+ FALLBACK sources -> DQS < 0.75
✅ DQS Step Function: DQS < 0.75 -> HARD_STOP (lot = 0%)
✅ DQS weights correct: vix=3, term_structure=3, treasury=4, gamma=3 (total=13)
✅ Confidence multipliers correct: LIVE=1.0, STALE=0.7, FALLBACK=0.3
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality returns 200
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality returns epoch status with epoch_id, sealed_at, dqs, confidence_map
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality returns LKG keys for all 7 sources
✅ GET /api/v3/data-quality returns circuit breakers status
✅ V3 signal /api/v3/signal/MNQ returns data_quality object
✅ V3 signal data_quality includes epoch_id, dqs, dqs_action, confidence_map
✅ V3 signal confidence_map includes all weighted sources
✅ V3 signal dqs_action is one of FULL, DEFENSIVE, HARD_STOP
✅ V3 signal nivel_1 includes dqs and dqs_action for frontend
✅ Data validation accepts VIX in valid range [8, 90]
✅ Data validation rejects VIX outside valid range
✅ Data validation works for treasury spread
✅ Frontend: N1 Market Regime section loads correctly
✅ Frontend: DQS badge hidden when DQS = 1.0 (as expected)
✅ Frontend: DQS warning hidden when dqs_action = FULL (as expected)
✅ Frontend: All macro data panels present (VIX, VXN, Gamma, Term Structure, Treasury)
critical_code_review_comments: LKGStore implementation correctly replaces np.random fallbacks with deterministic static values
CircuitBreaker pattern correctly isolates failing data sources (economic_calendar currently OPEN)
DataEpochManager correctly seals immutable snapshots with all 7 sources
DQS Step Function correctly applies lot scaling: FULL (>=0.9), DEFENSIVE (>=0.75), HARD_STOP (<0.75)
Remaining np.random calls are only in OHLCV/order flow simulation (not macro data fallbacks)
Frontend N1MarketRegime correctly shows/hides DQS badge based on dqs value
Frontend N1MarketRegime correctly shows/hides DQS warning based on dqs_action

test_credentials.note: Used for API and frontend tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live data and synthetic unit test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Quality Layer P0 fully tested. Key components: LKGStore (services/data_quality.py), CircuitBreaker, DataEpochManager, DQS Step Function. API endpoint: GET /api/v3/data-quality returns epoch status, LKG keys, circuit breakers. V3 signal includes data_quality object with epoch_id, dqs, dqs_action, confidence_map. Frontend N1MarketRegime shows DQS badge when dqs < 1.0 and DQS warning when dqs_action != FULL. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_data_quality.py. Current live status: VIX/VXN/Gamma/TermStructure/Treasury are LIVE, RVX and economic_calendar are FALLBACK.

feature_verification.GET /api/v3/data-quality: Working - returns epoch status, LKG keys, circuit breakers
feature_verification.LKG Store LIVE: Working - update() stores LIVE data, get() returns LIVE within TTL
feature_verification.LKG Store STALE: Working - get() returns STALE (deterministic) when past TTL
feature_verification.LKG Store FALLBACK: Working - get() returns static FALLBACK when no real data
feature_verification.DataEpoch seal_epoch(): Working - creates immutable epoch with all 7 sources
feature_verification.V3 signal data_quality: Working - includes epoch_id, dqs, dqs_action, confidence_map

live_data_status.economic_calendar: FALLBACK (jblanked.com API returning errors, circuit breaker OPEN)

mocked_api_note: POST /api/signalstack/order is MOCKED (SignalStack webhook). All data quality tests use live endpoints and MongoDB.
